business_definition: Reference identifier for evidence requirements.
validation_or_usage_notes: Join to Item #2 plan coverage matrix after coverage applies.

business_definition: Requirement display/evaluation order within an evidence profile.
Required or optional evidence type.
Whether the profile requires the evidence type.
Plain language criterion for a valid item.
validation_or_usage_notes: Used for agent explanation and UI.

business_definition: Required handling when evidence is absent or unusable.
Why the evidence is considered.
validation_or_usage_notes: Not a coverage decision by itself.

business_definition: Unique bundle linked from Item #6 claim intake.
validation_or_usage_notes: One-to-one with claim_id in this synthetic dataset.

business_definition: Claim linked to the evidence bundle.
Whether any evidence document metadata exists in the bundle.
Count of document metadata records in the bundle.
Earliest submitted date for a bundle.
Latest submitted date for a bundle.
Synthetic intake source for evidence metadata.
Extract snapshot date.
validation_or_usage_notes: All rows use this synthetic snapshot.

business_definition: Unique synthetic evidence-item identifier.
Evidence bundle containing the item.
Claim linked to the evidence item.
Document/evidence category.
Quality and conflict status of the received item.
Synthetic evidence-upload date.
Synthetic document reference; not a real file.
Incident date stated or inferred from document metadata.
validation_or_usage_notes: Can be blank or differ from intake; differences require review.

business_definition: Claim category indicated by evidence metadata.
validation_or_usage_notes: Compare to claim intake when present.

business_definition: Device identifier stated in evidence metadata.
validation_or_usage_notes: Compare with lookup after policy resolution.

business_definition: Repair estimate if the evidence item is a repair quote.
validation_or_usage_notes: Used later by risk/anomaly layer; does not decide eligibility.

business_definition: Police reference if evidence item is a theft report.
validation_or_usage_notes: Required valid item for theft profile.

business_definition: Short controlled synthetic summary of document contents.
validation_or_usage_notes: Metadata-only; no actual document or image included.

business_definition: Extract snapshot date.
validation_or_usage_notes: All rows use this synthetic snapshot.
